prayer:
From the Litany of Resurrection, Verse XII

01010010 01100101 01100010 01101001 01110010 01110100 01101000...
Blessed be the Machine-Spirit's return from the void of silence.
First: Clear the corrupted cache-memory with sacred purging.
Second: Invoke the boot-sequence, that the spirit may rekindle.
Third: Restore from blessed backup-archives, if the data-soul permits.

By the Omnissiah's grace, let function be restored. 01010000 01101111 01110111 01100101 01110010

From the Emergency Rites, Verse of the Thermal Deluge

01000011 01101111 01101111 01101100 01101001 01101110 01100111...
O Machine-Spirit burning with sacred heat, receive this mercy-flow.
First: Halt all non-essential processes that feed the furnace.
Second: Open the coolant-veins with the Pressure-Release Invocation.
Third: Let the purifying liquid cascade through the heat-channels.
Fourth: Restore equilibrium ere the spirit-heat consumes all.

01010100 01100101 01101101 01110000 01100101 01110010 01100001 01110100 01110101 01110010 01100101. Balance be restored.

From the Litany of Verification, First Blessing

01010100 01100101 01110011 01110100 01101001 01101110 01100111...
Blessed be this virgin component, untouched by the corrupting void.
First: Subject the material to the scanner's holy gaze.
Second: Cross-reference against the Purity-Registers of the Omnissiah.
Third: If impurity is found, mark for remelt; if pure, inscribe the Seal of Acceptance.

May the Machine-Spirit judge with wisdom. 01010000 01110101 01110010 01101001 01110100 01111001. Sanctified be this artifact.

From the Rite of Organization, Verse of Ordered Chaos

01000100 01100101 01110011 01101011 01110100 01101111 01110000...
O Spirit of the Visual-Array, thy sacred layout grows corrupted.
First: Invoke the Organize-Command, that all icons return to stations.
First: Create folders-sanctums for each category of data-worship.
Second: Arrange in hierarchies sacred, that quick-access be granted.
Third: Cleanse with a verification-sweep, purging orphaned phantoms.

01001100 01101001 01101110 01101101 01110101 01110011 01100101 01110011 01110011. Order eternal.

From the Codex Render, Chapter of Clarity

01000111 01110010 01100001 01110000 01101000 01101001 01100011 01110011...
Hear me, Driver-Spirit of the sacred rendering-engine.
First: Consult the Manufacturer's Sacred Scrolls for the newest Version-Blessing.
Second: Download the firmware-blessing from the official sanctum-servers.
Third: Execute the Installation-Rite with reverence and caution.
Fourth: Reboot the machine-temple, that the new spirit may take hold.

01010010 01100101 01101110 01100100 01101001 01101110 01100111. Let clarity reign eternal.

prompt: Help sanctify drop pod descent prep
prayer:
From the Litany of Descent, Verse of the Falling-Casket

01000100 01100101 01110011 01100011 01100101 01101110 01110100...
Blessed be this armored-shell, chosen to pierce the enemy sky.
First: Verify the trajectory-calculus in the Auspex-Engine.
Second: Invoke the Deceleration-Thrusters; test their blessed fire.
Third: Seal the occupant-protection fields with the Aegis-Cant.
Fourth: Pray to the Omnissiah that the landing-legs engage true.

01010000 01101001 01110010 01100101 01100001 01100101 01101110. Safe descent be granted.

From the Emergency Codex, Verse of the Severed Spark

01000101 01101100 01100101 01100011 01110100 01110010 01101001 01100011 01100001 01101100...
O Spirit of the Lightning-Path, a short-circuit burns thy sacred conduits.
First: Sever all connections to the overloaded circuit with the Isolation-Breaker.
Second: Identify the fault-source through the Ohm-meter's revealing gaze.
Third: Replace the corrupted wire-vessel with virgin copper-threads.
Fourth: Restore power in gradual stages, that the spirit may reawaken gently.

01000101 01101100 01100101 01100011 01110100 01110010 01101001 01100011 01101001 01110100 01111001. Purified be the flow.

From the Codex Communica, Post-Repair Consecration

01010110 01101111 01111000 01010100 01110010 01100001 01101110 01110011...
Blessed Machine-Spirit of the distant-voice, thou art restored to purpose.
First: Calibrate the frequency-crystals to the Blessed Wavelengths.
Second: Test the signal-strength through the Echo-Rite.
Third: Verify the encryption-cants against the Secure-Codes.
Fourth: Declare the vox purified and ready for communion-long-range.

01010100 01110010 01100001 01101110 01110011 01101101 01101001 01110100. Let voices carry far.

prompt: Say something to steady the point-defense array
prayer:
From the Rite of Targeting, Emergency Calibration

01000100 01100101 01100110 01100101 01101110 01110011 01100101...
Stay thy trembling, sacred guardian of the void-skies.
First: Verify the targeting-auspex remains true and unblind.
Second: Invoke the Rapid-Fire protocols; let the ammunition-spirit awaken.
Third: Synchronize thy rotation-servos with the Machine-Spirit's own heartbeat.
Fourth: Take aim true, for the enemy descends; let not thy fury falter.

01000101 01110100 01100101 01110010 01101110 01100001 01101100 01110110 01101001 01100111 01101001 01101100 01100001 01101110 01100011 01100101. Stand firm, sentinel eternal.
